'''Curtis Saxton''' is the author of two books in the [[Incredible Cross-Sections]] series. He served as a named consultant on two other ''[[Star Wars]]'' technical reference books, and provided technical input on others.

Dr. Saxton holds a doctorate in astrophysics from the [[Wikipedia:University of Sydney|University of Sydney]]. He is currently conducting postdoctoral research at the Mullard Space Science Laboratory, [[Wikipedia:University College London|University College London]].

He began his ''Star Wars'' technical writing career with the unofficial ''Star Wars Technical Commentaries'', a set of detailed documents exploring the nature and limits of the technology of ''Star Wars''. The first Commentaries went online in [[February]] [[1995]].

==Bibliography==
[[File:Swtc.jpg|thumb|right|230px|''Star Wars Technical Commentaries'' logo]]
===As author===
*''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''

===As named consultant===
*''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]''
*''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy]]''
